Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Great Elders]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Of Sea and Shadow ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 9''' — The only details known of the Great Elders come from their greatest opponent.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 12''' — The Emperor designed techniques that work against the spawn of certain Great Elders.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 22''' — The Sleepless aim to communicate with the Great Elders to benefit from their wisdom.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 28''' — Most Great Elders view themselves as benefactors.}}

== Of Shadow and Sea ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 15''' — Great Elders use their powers through containers rather than directly.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 16''' — The Emperor has living memories of the Great Elders.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 18''' — The Great Elders are subjects of horror stories told by the Emperor.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 27''' — According to The Sleepless, the Great Elders are not dead but merely sleeping.}}

== Of Dawn and Darkness ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 4''' — Great Elders are powerful entities that the Emperor could respond to using the Optasia.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 6''' — Great Elders have broad power and access to a global net of devices that amplify Intent.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 8''' — Great Elders often have conflicting goals.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 12''' — Humanity needs someone who can deal with the Great Elders on their terms.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 12''' — The Great Elders might task Jerri with killing Shera.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 14''' — The Great Elders are entities that move.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 14''' — Calder considers the wishes of the Great Elders.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 16''' — The Great Elders are a group that the Optasia acts as a conduit to.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 16''' — The Great Elders are immortals that can be negotiated with.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 16''' — The Great Elders can core a person and replace them.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 16''' — The Great Elders set the stage for certain events.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 24''' — Great Elders use the void for transportation and communication.}}

== Of Darkness and Dawn ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 4''' — Jorin has unraveled more ancient secrets of the Great Elders than any other human.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 9''' — There are six other Great Elders according to old legends.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 15''' — The Great Elders are a group that the Emperor avoids talking about.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 15''' — The Optasia allows for the understanding and negotiation of Great Elders on an equal level.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 16''' — The Great Elders are powerful entities that were defeated almost fifteen hundred years ago.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 16''' — Great Elders do not die like humans; they can gather themselves and potentially wake from death.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 18''' — The Great Elders are beings that the Emperor once served.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 21''' — The Great Elders want to destroy the Empire.}}

== Of Kings and Killers ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 1''' — The false Emperor would deliver people to the Great Elders.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 4''' — The Great Elders are involved in the upcoming meeting.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 6''' — Shera reports that the Great Elders are moving.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 7''' — The Emperor and Jorin had fought the Great Elders together.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 8''' — There are superstitions about naming Great Elders directly.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 9''' — The security on the Great Elders has been weak.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 9''' — The Great Elders may be watching the place closely.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 11''' — The Great Elders left a crack in the sky.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 13''' — Bliss seeks to protect people from the Great Elders.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 19''' — The Great Elders want to pass through the crack in the sky to ascend beyond this world.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 19''' — The Great Elders may seek human bodies or vessels.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 19''' — The Great Elders were involved in the Elder War.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 20''' — Great Elders possess strong servants.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 22''' — The Great Elders need to be kept sealed.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 23''' — There are four remaining Great Elders.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 25''' — The Great Elders are awake.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 25''' — The Great Elders are attempting to leave the world in which they are imprisoned.}}

== Of Killers and Kings ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 2''' — The Great Elders are the true enemies.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 2''' — The Great Elders might be trying to force unification.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 3''' — The Great Elders do not live as humans understand it.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 4''' — Great Elders are capable of killing every major leader in the Empire.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 4''' — The Great Elders are planning something.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 6''' — The involvement of Great Elders means there will be no good ending.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 8''' — Great Elders are entities that will rise.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 10''' — Great Elders could take over the world by taking over one person on the throne.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 13''' — The Great Elders can be opposed by the Guilds in times of emergency.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 14''' — The Great Elders are entities that could be freed by the Optasia.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 14''' — The Great Elders' ultimate goal is to escape the world.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 14''' — The Great Elders cracked open the sky as an act of opportunity.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 14''' — The Great Elders are gathering their strength.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 20''' — Guilds typically cooperate to maintain security on the Great Elders.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 24''' — Great Elders are vulnerable in human form and can be killed.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 27''' — The power of the Great Elders was required to hold open the sky.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
